label: 2026 Orbital Launches
delta: Starlink 17-22 (Apr 19, 25 sats, B1097 7th flight, OCISLY — 600th booster recovery milestone). Next: GPS III SV-10 'Hedy Lamarr' targeting Apr 21 (49th launch of 2026, final GPS III satellite). Preceded by: Starlink 10-24 (Apr 14) & Starlink 17-27 (Apr 15)

label: Total Booster Recoveries (All-Time)
delta: 600th: B1097 7th flight on OCISLY (Starlink 17-22, Apr 19) — historic milestone, 10 years 4 months after first landing Dec 21, 2015. 599th: B1082 21st flight (Starlink 17-27, Apr 15)

label: Max Single Booster Reflights
delta: B1067 confirmed record 34th flight on Starlink 10-44 (Mar 30, 2026)

label: Starship Integrated Flight Tests
delta: IFT-12 ground milestones cleared: Ship 39 completed 60-second 6-engine Raptor 3 static fire (Apr 15); Booster 19 completed historic 33-engine full 15-second static fire at Pad 2 (Apr 16). IFT-12 firmly targeting May 2026.

label: SpaceX + xAI IPO Valuation Target
contestNote: Confidential SEC S-1 filed Apr 1, 2026; $75B raise targeting June 2026 Nasdaq IPO; pre-public offering valuation

label: Falcon 9 Cost per kg to LEO
contestNote: Depends on mission profile; Starlink internal pricing may differ
